claim: The total gene count of JCVI-Syn3A is reported inconsistently across sources (roughly 452 protein-coding genes vs ~493 total annotated features vs 496 in the existing simulator code). Needs resolution by parsing the authoritative GenBank record CP016816.

options.interpretation: total annotated features including RNA genes (project brief)
count quoted in existing simulator code docstring
count for Syn3.0 precursor (before 19 genes were restored to make Syn3A)

source_detail: Ground truth is CP016816's feature table. We have not staged the file on disk yet.
caveats: Different counts may all be internally consistent under different definitions (protein-coding vs total annotated vs CDS-with-locus-tag).
'Gene' vs 'CDS' vs 'feature' distinction must be made explicit once we parse the GenBank file.
CP016816 has multiple revisions; revision used must be pinned.
